text_template: Mornings can feel like a lot, but there's one small choice that can make mornings feel good. Silk Protein. It's a smooth, plant-based beverage with 13 grams of complete plant protein and 50% less sugar than dairy milk. Pour it into your cereal, blend it into a smoothie, stir it into your coffee. Silk Protein makes mornings feel a little calmer, a little brighter, a little more okay. I got this. Silk Protein. Feel planty good.
intro_variants: Mornings can feel like a lot, but there's one small choice that can make mornings feel good. Silk Protein.
